directives.description: Avoid using deprecated tags and functions.

directives.description: Escape CSS hash symbols inside <cfoutput> blocks using ##

directives.description: Use `this` scope for component properties and methods when appropriate.

directives.description: Document all functions with purpose, parameters, and return values (use Javadoc or similar style).

directives.description: Prefer dependency injection for component collaboration.
